posts.raw_content:
Western civilization is being destroyed by a fertility crisis. Because our fertility rate is too low, politicians use this as an excuse to import hostile foreigners to replace us.

Porn is the easy case. Porn destroys  women who create it and makes men who watch it demented freaks. Our ancestors used to have to kill 7 men and raise/sell 50 sheep before they could see a pair of (below average) tits. Letting anyone look at Sydney Sweeney’s perfect breasts anytime on their phone destroys natural mating instincts. Letting women become millionaires through glorified prostitution ensures they will never be good mothers.

Dating apps must also be banned. These apps were made by literal faggots and are all based on the Grindr prototype where literal faggots “match” with thousands of other fags and have sex with hundreds of them. Men thought this idea would be awesome until they figured out all the decent-looking women just take turns with Chad. The result is 80% of men are lonely and 90% of women are broken skanks who can’t pair bond. Gone are the days when mid women would settle for a mid man in her hometown. These apps give women access to tens of thousands of douchebags from all over their state.

Most controversially, we need to ban instagram, which is basically just another dating app. Apps like this incentivize shallow behavior and acting like a faggot who spends all his time looking in a mirror and taking selfies. Men were not meant to live this way. women are being totally mindfucked by these apps and have almost no existence independent from them.

The world would be a better place without these 3 things. Nobody gives a fuck about your “liberty” to be a faggot or a skank, you Lolbertarian dipshits. Ban the bad things if you want to create a good society.
